sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-06-17 06:30
- Distance: 8 km
- Moving time: 45:35
- Elapsed time: 47:01
- Elevation gain: 124.4 m
- Average heart rate: 164.4 bpm
- Max heart rate: 180 bpm
- Average watts: 208.3 W
- Average speed: 10.6 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `164.2 bpm`, ranging from `152.1` to `171.8 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `170.0 spm`, with a working range of `108.8` to `176.9 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `169.4 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `169.5 spm` (+0.0 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:41 /km` across `8.021 km` in `45:35` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:28 /km` and second-half pace was `5:54 /km` (+27 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `164.4 bpm` average and `180 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `157.5 bpm` in the first half and `170.5 bpm` in the second (+13.1 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `45:35` out of `47:01` elapsed (97.0%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `11` stop segments and `1.4%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `134.6 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.6 m` and `69.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `36.6 m` in the first half and `98.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
